'''Kirima''' was the lone habitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]], on the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It was discovered by [[Jak Kalinda]], who named it for his [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Kirima Kalinda]]. The planet had plenty of natural resources, and was colonized shortly after its discovery. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Kirima was [[Verena City]]. The planet was headquarters of [[Vespula Manufacturing & Exports]], which was destroyed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] hired by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]. The local monarchy dwelt in [[Shamd City]].

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], [[Cor Mynus]], was assigned here.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Different planets with same name.|Jason Fry|<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/58683147|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2023-10-28|time=5:22 PM|quote=Different planets with same name.|archivedate=20231029035113}}</ref>}}
In [[canon]], [[The High Republic (2021) 4|''The High Republic'' (2021) 4]] introduced the [[planet]] [[Kirima]], which [[Jason Fry]] stated was a different planet to the Legends one but had the same name.<ref name="JCF" />
